creator: alex@infobit.ru
text:
At random moment reading stops. System hangs several seconds after this.
After hanging I can not even switch virtual consoles with Alt-F1, Alt-F2 etc.
In /var/log/messages there are a lot of lines like these:

Oct 24 21:11:43 home kernel: cam_periph_mapmem: attempt to map 262144 bytes, which is greater than DFLTPHYS(65536)
Oct 24 21:11:43 home kernel: cam_periph_mapmem: attempt to map 260096 bytes, which is greater than DFLTPHYS(65536)

Sometimes system doesn't hang, but reading stops and k3b reports read error.
In /var/log messages in this case a lot of lines like:

Oct 23 21:39:07 home kernel: ata1: FAILURE - non aligned DMA transfer attempted
Oct 23 21:39:07 home kernel: acd0: setting up DMA failed
Oct 23 21:39:07 home kernel: ata1: FAILURE - non aligned DMA transfer attempted
Oct 23 21:39:07 home kernel: acd0: setting up DMA failed
Oct 23 21:39:07 home kernel: ata1: FAILURE - non aligned DMA transfer attempted
Oct 23 21:39:07 home kernel: acd0: setting up DMA failed

Sometimes (rarely) reading completes successfuly.

readcd does not hang system but often also stops at random moment but 10-20
seconds later it continues.
readcd output:
